title: 🔥周期定位复刻历史底
body: 市场处于周期底部磨底阶段。MVRV 为 1.40，对比上轮周期同期（2022-05）的 1.32，当前估值定位极其接近历史大底。虽价格 7 日回升 2.4%，但仍偏离 200 日定投成本 -11.1%。数据表明市场处于绝望期尾部，具备极高的盈亏比。偏多。黎明前的黑暗还有多久？
body_en: The market is currently grinding at the cycle bottom. MVRV sits at 1.40; compared to 1.32 during the same period of the last cycle (May '22), current valuation is tracking extremely close to the historical macro bottom. Despite a 2.4% 7-day rebound, price is still trading -11.1% below the 200-day DCA cost basis. Data suggests we are at the tail end of the despair phase, offering an asymmetric risk/reward setup. Bullish bias. How much longer before the dawn breaks?
